title: tragacantha kessleri
intro: Tragacantha kessleri, also known as Russian thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, characterized by its thorny stems and spiny leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Tragacantha kessleri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
